commands.command: local dependency scan plus gh search code repopact --owner ForgeWireLabs
commands.summary: Identified all adopter remotes: ForgeLink, skillforge-academy, forgewire, moto-one-hyper-forgewire-rom-lab, and repopact-proving-ground. Duplicate local SkillForge checkouts resolve to one remote.

commands.command: ForgeLink work item 034 validation and push
commands.summary: Exact PyPI pin repopact==2.2.0; governance audit, 221 renderer tests, and 202 of 203 Node tests passed with one opt-in live Twilio test skipped; main commit 86f8d67c9ea8770f364b35d06a5c417a00f31815.

commands.command: SkillForge work item 307 validation and push
commands.summary: Exact PyPI pin repopact==2.2.0; governance and content validation passed for 3 certifications, 19 domains, 770 questions, 135 flashcards, 28 PBQs, and 150 lessons; main commit 71be8edf6f0de184070d942fc9fa49cf93f64234.

commands.command: ForgeWire work item 203 validation and push
commands.summary: Exact PyPI pin repopact==2.2.0; governance passed and audit validation reported 0 errors with 8 pre-existing review-age warnings; unrelated Fabric edits remained uncommitted and excluded; main commit d26be0fb42faf10cd973e6110c23b5ee766a3de1.

commands.command: Moto One Hyper work item 028 validation and push
commands.summary: Vendored marker 2.2.0; upstream canonical-dashboard behavior was merged with preserved ROM-lab safety checks; all 150 tests passed without device or firmware mutation; main commit 4ad7400b227e12ec67a25be52b5cb586f1ded5d5.

commands.command: Proving Ground work item 002 validation and push
commands.summary: Exact PyPI pin repopact==2.2.0; governance, 8 unit tests, 24 PactBench tasks, and the drift selftest passed; master commit 8f68bc4ba38aadfb85c11f51d0e21f89201cc274.

commands.command: GitHub Contents API plus git ls-remote verification
commands.summary: Every default branch publicly reports 2.2.0 through requirements-repopact.txt or Moto's scripts/REPOPACT_VERSION, and every local release commit equals its remote default-branch head.

commands.command: python scripts/validate_repo.py && python scripts/run_conformance.py && python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
commands.summary: Upstream governance validation passed, conformance passed 8 of 8 scenarios, and all 101 unit tests passed with the two documented open-model cases skipped.
